summary: Tested 3 new features: AI Co-GM, Equipment Enhancement, Combat Enhancement. Backend API tests passed (9/10). Frontend tests verified AI Co-GM panel, tab context switching, GM Screen tabs, and theme consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Co-GM (AICoGM.js): Correctly implements context-aware chat with TAB_CONTEXTS mapping for 9 different tab contexts
GMScreen.js: Correctly imports and renders AICoGM component with activeTab prop for context switching
CombatPage.js: CONDITIONS array includes new conditions (hasted, raging, hexed) with proper descriptions at lines 36-38
CharacterInventory.js: Uses Electric Tundra theme (cyan #4DD0E1, blue #0066FF) - no pink/red colors
Backend /api/rook/chat endpoint: Working correctly with campaign context integration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features tested and working: 1) AI Co-GM floating panel opens via sparkle button (data-testid='ai-cogm-toggle'), shows context-aware hints based on active tab, and successfully sends/receives AI responses. 2) Combat Page has enhanced CONDITIONS array with hasted, raging, hexed conditions with descriptions. 3) CharacterInventory uses Electric Tundra theme (cyan/blue). GM Screen has 12 tabs (no Uploads tab).

passed: test_rook_chat_basic - Basic AI chat without context
test_rook_chat_with_campaign_context - AI chat with campaign context
test_rook_chat_combat_context - Combat Advisor context
test_rook_chat_location_context - Location Guide context
test_rook_chat_npc_context - NPC Voice context
test_rook_chat_story_context - Story Architect context
test_rook_chat_unauthorized - Returns 401/403 without auth
test_rook_chat_empty_message - Handles empty message
test_get_campaign_players - Gets players from campaign
AI Co-GM toggle button visible (data-testid='ai-cogm-toggle')
AI Co-GM panel opens on click (data-testid='ai-cogm-panel')
AI panel shows 'Combat Advisor' for Combat tab
AI panel shows 'Location Guide' for Location tab
AI panel shows 'NPC Voice' for NPCs tab
AI panel shows 'Intrigue Weaver' for NPC Network tab
AI panel shows 'Story Architect' for Story Arcs tab
AI panel shows 'Bestiary Expert' for Monsters tab
AI hint buttons present and clickable
AI input field and send button present
AI returns response when hint clicked
GM Screen has 12 tabs (combat, location, npcs, network, monsters, tables, loot, dice, party, notes, story, sound)
Uploads tab correctly removed from GM Screen
Homepage shows dual theme (purple GM side, cyan Player side)
CharacterInventory uses Electric Tundra theme (cyan/blue)

code_verification.CharacterInventory_theme: Verified Electric Tundra theme with accent: '#4DD0E1', purple: '#0066FF'
